description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.10 Docker image. Define a single job named test that runs in the default test stage and executes the exact script commands: export CONFIG=testing, export MAIL_VIA_API=0, export MAIL_VIA_SMTP=0, pip install -e ., pip install pytest, and python -m pytest. The job has no additional services, caches, artifacts, or rules and runs on every pipeline execution.
